examples: There are three kinds of weapons: foil, epee , and sword.
There are three kinds of sword used in the Olympic fencing - foil, sabre, and epee.
In foil and epee, a touch can be considered valid only if it is made with the point of the weapon.
Fencing involves three weapons: the foil, the sabre and the epee.
Limardo won the men's individual epee late on Wednesday, beating Norwegian Bartosz Piasecki 15-10 to earn Venezuela only its second Olympic gold medal in history.
